word: G4147 - πλουτέω - ploutéō - ploo-teh'-o - Be increased with goods

sections.paragraph: சுருக்க விளக்கம் / Short Definition: Be increased with goods
இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Verb / வினைச்சொல்
to be rich, to have abundance: to be richly supplied
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From G4148; to be (or become) wealthy (literally or figuratively): - be increased with goods, (be made, wax) rich.
